name: Luffy Is the Man Who Will Become the King of Pirates!!!

issues.description: First effect uses 'PlayFromHand' action, but card text says 'Set your [Roronoa Zoro] Leader as active' — this is a Leader activation, not playing a character from hand. Should use a Leader-specific action or clarify the mechanic.
Second effect trigger 'Trigger' is undefined and unclear. No condition specifies when this power boost activates. The text only describes setting Leader as active; no secondary effect is mentioned.
PowerBoost action (+1000 power, EndOfTurn) has no basis in the provided card text. Card text contains no power boost effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Set your [Roronoa Zoro] Leader as active.
